mapper.sql:
select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , bco.business_card_ocr_id , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.source , bco.ocr_result , ci.email
FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id
mapper.select: select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , bco.business_card_ocr_id , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.source , bco.ocr_result , ci.email ,card_image.resource_id as card_image_resource_id ,card_image.resource_name as card_image_resource_name ,card_image.resource_path as card_image_resource_path ,card_image.related_table_name as card_image_related_table_name ,card_image.related_table_key as card_image_related_table_key ,card_image.relate_table_column_name as card_image_relate_table_column_name FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='business_card_ocr' and relate_table_column_name='card_image') as card_image on card_image.related_table_key=bco.business_card_ocr_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , bco.business_card_ocr_id , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.source , bco.ocr_result , ci.email FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , bco.business_card_ocr_id , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.source , bco.ocr_result , ci.email FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , bco.business_card_ocr_id , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.source , bco.ocr_result , ci.email FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id where bco.business_card_ocr_id = #{id}
select count(*) FROM business_card_ocr bco left join customer_info ci on bco.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 = ci.customer_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
